codeReview.summary: The synthesis document fully meets all requirements. It includes a comparative table with 4 code quality areas (architecture, patterns, errors, domains), quantitative scores for both branches (main: 8.5/10 overall, gem: 8.1/10), a declared winner with justification, and 15+ specific code citations with file:line references. The document also documents 3 critical bugs in gem with severity levels and recommendations.

summary: Feature synthesis-code-analysis passed review. The worker followed the analysis-worker skill procedure correctly with no deviations.
